statement.informal: `synthetic_power_command` satisfies its @verify contract: under preconditions (abs(df_dt) <= DF_DT_MAX ∧ frequency_meas >= F_MIN ∧ frequency_meas <= F_MAX ∧ frequency_nominal >= F_MIN ∧ frequency_nominal <= F_MAX ∧ k_inertia >= K_INERTIA_MIN ∧ k_inertia <= K_INERTIA_MAX ∧ k_droop >= K_DROOP_MIN ∧ k_droop <= K_DROOP_MAX), the function's result satisfies (True).
